_meta.coverage_note: Top 10 raw signals from WDM sources — unanalysed

items.title: V-Dem 2026 Report: US democracy deteriorating at unprecedented speed
items.summary: V-Dem Institute's 2026 Democracy Report identifies USA as undergoing rapid autocratization alongside Italy and UK. Rule of law deteriorating in 22 countries including US; warns of 2026 midterms as critical test.
items.domain_relevance: Democratic backsliding, rule of law erosion in established democracies

items.title: Senate debates SAVE America Act to ban mail-in voting, eliminate filibuster
items.summary: US Senate in floor debate on SAVE America Act imposing strict citizenship verification and banning most mail-in voting. GOP pushes to eliminate filibuster amid moderate concern for electoral process.
items.domain_relevance: Election integrity threats via ballot access restrictions

items.title: California sheriff seizes 650k ballots defying state election officials
items.summary: Sheriff running for governor seized 650,000 ballots over disputed count, breaking election administration chain. Incident covered mainly by right-leaning outlets.

items.title: Freedom House 2026: 54 countries see deterioration in rights, liberties
items.summary: Freedom in the World 2026 reports 54 countries declined in political rights and civil liberties, starkest warning yet on global democracy collapse. Media freedom, expression, due process hit hardest.
items.domain_relevance: Global civil liberties decline, autocratic collaboration

items.title: Trump expresses satisfaction at Robert Mueller's death
items.summary: President Trump publicly satisfied at death of former FBI Director Mueller, condemned as breach of decorum toward public servant.
items.domain_relevance: Erosion of democratic norms by executive rhetoric

items.title: V-Dem, Freedom House confirm rapid US democratic dismantling in Trump's 2nd year
items.summary: Three global monitors (V-Dem, Freedom House, Bright Line Watch) assess US institutions dismantled at historic pace in first year of Trump's second term.
items.domain_relevance: Confirmation of autocratization in US by key monitors

items.title: Trump's US political revolution dismantling checks on power
items.summary: Trump systematically dismantling checks, capturing government machinery against enemies; guardrails buckling, transforming US system.
items.domain_relevance: Executive overreach and state capture risks

items.title: US reviving Monroe Doctrine with Venezuela regime change
items.summary: Trump ousts Maduro via regime-change campaign, trials him in US; risks backlash in Western Hemisphere from heavy-handed tactics.

items.title: Arizona 2020 election probe continues without ballot access
items.summary: Arizona's ongoing 2020 probe lacks access to actual ballots but persists, raising integrity concerns.

items.title: Trump normalizes military in domestic affairs, erodes checks
items.summary: Trump actions normalize military domestic involvement, erode constitutional checks, undermine democratic model.
items.domain_relevance: Civil liberties threat via military politicization
